uplink.description: fPort 2: temp 22.50C, humidity 48.00%, no motion, battery 3.30V (synthetic, in-bounds; expected from upstream arithmetic)
uplink._note: Bytes synthesized in-bounds; expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (with its missing `var bytes = input.bytes` binding supplied) and remapping to normalized vocabulary keys. Temperature 2250=0x08CA signed BE /100; humidity 4800=0x12C0 BE /100; battery (230+100)/100.

uplink.description: fPort 2: negative temp -5.00C, humidity 40.00%, motion present, battery 3.00V (synthetic, exercises signed BE decode + motion=true)
uplink._note: Bytes synthesized in-bounds; expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js. Temperature -500 -> 65036=0xFE0C signed BE /100; humidity 4000=0x0FA0 BE /100; movement byte 1 (nonzero) -> detected true; battery (200+100)/100.
Upstream default branch returns { errors: ['unknown FPort'] } for any fPort other than 2.

uplink.description: fPort 2 truncated payload returns an error
uplink._note: Length guard: a faithful improvement over upstream, which would read undefined bytes and emit NaN.
